nodes.label: kalkulator-graficzny-ai-ekran-lcd.png
nodes.description: Gallery photo showing a study scene on a bed: an open laptop displaying a blue KalkMate-related screen, a scientific/graphing calculator placed on the duvet next to open math/textbooks and notebooks, illuminated by a desk lamp. Used as marketing imagery on the KalkMate website to portray the AI calculator with LCD screen in a real student study context.
